rootCause: The loop did not wrap fetch(url) in a try/catch, causing the script to crash immediately on network errors (e.g. timeout, DNS resolution failure) instead of retrying.
impact: If a network failure occurs, the entire scraping job crashes, discarding all progress.
reproductionSteps: Turn off network and run scraping, or mock fetch to throw an error. Observe the app crashing.
patchApplied: Wrapped the fetch and response parsing logic in a try/catch block to properly retry on network errors.
testsAddedOrUpdated: "Fetch retry loop recovers after intermittent 500 error" test was updated to throw a simulated network error and verify retry logic.
verificationResult: Test passes, retry occurs exactly 3 times before returning success.
